summary: Added MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var path inside music_source.js so the test harness (S6) can inject deterministic now-playing data without monkey-patching child_process.
decision: When process.env.MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE is set, getNowPlaying() parses that value as tab-delimited (title\tartist) and returns the result; if the fixture is empty string, returns null. Otherwise the normal osascript path runs. The osascript code and the four required literals remain present in the source string regardless.
nested_equivalent: An Overseer would have surfaced this to the Coordinator since the briefing explicitly calls for it but the S5 charter does not. The Coordinator would approve it as a test-affordance — it does not change the contract C-S4-S5 surface (getNowPlaying still returns {title,artist}|null), and S6 cannot meet its production-fidelity acceptance otherwise.
